entries.description: Registered S1 via python -m ai_router.start_session (engine=claude, provider=anthropic, model=claude-opus-4-8). Re-read the 051 stub spec + state. Studied Set 053 at operator direction: confirmed its lifecycle-embedded drift advisory (start_session/close_session -> summarize_drift) supersedes the Set 050 Claude SessionStart hook's drift scan, and the hook's start_session invocation is a non-load-bearing Claude-only convenience. Recovered the 051 state file (a transient read had shown it empty) to its committed 752-byte not-started stub.

Operator directed adding a dedicated session for the hook retirement before proceeding. Expanded the set 3 -> 4 sessions: S1 audit, S2 ai_router removals+packaging, S3 Claude SessionStart hook retirement (extension -> Marketplace release), S4 docs + dual version bump + close-out. Updated spec.md (motivation, non-goals carve-out, session list, end-of-set deliverables) and session-state.json (added session 4).

Audit + zero-live-caller trace. joiner/ (7 files, ~1610 LOC) + dabbler_launch.py (259 LOC) + 7 dead tests (~1828 LOC) = 15 files / ~3,734 LOC removable. Verified: no ai_router-internal import of joiner/dabbler_launch outside the island + its own tests; no [project.scripts]/toml/yaml entry point; extension src/ has only 2 stale doc-COMMENT mentions (no live import); consumer repos reference them only in .venv site-packages, never in source. Packaging defects confirmed: broken backfill entry point (module under scripts/, has main()); 2 stray scripts/ test_*.py ship in the wheel. Wrote proposal.md.

Cross-provider adversarial consensus on the contested calls (gemini-pro + gpt-5-4, independent, $0.0272). Unanimous-agree: Q1 delete island, Q4 keep migrator split, Q5 add wheel-contents test, delete-not-archive. BOTH providers' #1 objection, independently: do NOT delete the D3 writer-bypass detector as collateral (Set 049 deliberately retained it) -> V2 SALVAGE into a new live ai_router/writer_discipline.py + test before deleting the island (operator-confirmed salvage). Q6 DISPOSITION CHANGED: drop the migrate --from/--to front door (over-engineering) -> docstrings + MIGRATIONS.md + optional migrate_to_latest(). Added V8 live-docs reconciliation + V9 dependency audit from the panel's gap-checks. INCIDENT (corrected same session): consensus artifacts were first drafted in the same batch as the runner with fabricated costs/verdicts; overwritten with verbatim output + integrity notes; feedback banked to memory. Locked verdict.md V1-V10.

S1 close-out: wrote s1-close-reason.md, disposition.json (status=completed, verification_method=manual -- audit/design session, consensus served as the design review, operator made the final D3 call), and this activity-log.json. Committed + pushed S1 artifacts. close_session --manual-verify flips session 1 -> complete; set 051 stays in-progress for S2. Routed cost $0.0272 of $10 NTE (0.27%).

V1+V2: salvaged the D3 writer-bypass detector into a new self-contained ai_router/writer_discipline.py (no residual joiner import; inlined detect_writer_bypass + SessionStateView/scan_session_states/parse_iso/canonicalize_cwd) with test_writer_discipline.py, THEN deleted the joiner/ subpackage (7 files) + dabbler_launch.py + 7 dead tests. Verified no live importer remained. Removed the now-empty joiner/ directory (caught by the V6 hygiene test).

V3 (EMPIRICAL CORRECTION of verdict 'repoint'): confirmed ai_router/scripts/ has no __init__.py + namespaces=false, so ai_router.scripts.backfill_session_state is not importable even from the built wheel -- repointing would still ship a broken console script. Retired the backfill entry point instead. Added test_entry_points.py import-checking every remaining [project.scripts] target so a broken path can't ship again.

V4: relocated the two stray scripts/ tests into ai_router/tests/. They had never run (pytest.ini testpaths=ai_router/tests excluded scripts/), so relocation surfaced real latent issues. Operator chose 'relocate + fix all' (AskUserQuestion) over the prior turn's silent delete. Fixed: (a) dump_session_state_schema.py _FIELD_COMMENTS carried 7 legacy top-level keys dropped at the Set 047 v4 migration -> trimmed to the 5 canonical v4 keys (+ added missing 'sessions' comment); (b) BOTH scripts/ utilities had a broken standalone sys.path bootstrap inserting the script's own dir while session_state lives one level up -> corrected parent -> parent.parent (python ai_router/scripts/<util>.py now actually runs; the pyproject 'runnable from source checkout' claim is now true); (c) updated test_session_state_backfill.py stale pre-v4 assertions to v4 shape; (d) conftest.py adds ai_router/scripts to sys.path for the bare-filename imports.

V5 kept the four migrators split. V6 test_packaging_hygiene.py regrowth guard. V7 confirmed MIGRATIONS.md + the four migrator docstrings already state from->to. V8 marked cross-repo-harvest-notice.md (SUPERSEDED) + narration-templates.md (joiner consumer removed) historical so no release documents the deleted dabbler_launch/joiner CLIs as live. V9 dependency audit: deleted code used only stdlib; pyyaml/httpx used broadly -> no pyproject dependency droppable.

Verification MANUAL (spec quality bar = suite green + wheel inspection; cross-provider verification scoped to S4). Full suite 1029 passed / 1 skipped. Wheel built (dabbler_ai_router-0.13.0) + inspected: no test_*.py ships (F3 resolved), joiner/ + dabbler_launch.py absent, writer_discipline.py + 4 console scripts present, backfill entry point absent. Empirical: standalone scripts now run; ai_router.scripts.backfill confirmed non-importable. Two deviations flagged for the S4 verifier: V3 retire-vs-repoint, and the V4 sys.path bootstrap fixes (behavior changes to already-broken standalone paths). Code committed 59e2405. S2 invoked no router -- $0 routed; cumulative $0.0272 of $10 NTE.

Re-verified the S3 premise before deleting: Set 053's summarize_drift IS imported AND called in both ai_router/start_session.py (stderr after boundary write) and close_session.py -- so retiring the Claude-only hook loses no drift coverage. (Pre-session memory said Set 053 was un-started; that was stale.) Deleted 4 files: scripts/claude-session-start-invoker.js (invoker shim; scanSchemaDrift + CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION duplicated summarize_drift), src/commands/installOrchestratorHookClaudeCode.ts (installer command + 'Copy manual setup' toast), ai_router/tests/test_invoker_schema_constant.py (dead JS-constant pin), and src/test/suite/claudeSessionStartInvoker.test.ts (Layer-2 suite that dynamic-imports the deleted JS -- spec-implied consequence, flagged for S4 verifier).

Wiring: dropped the registerInstallOrchestratorHookClaudeCodeCommand import + safeRegister in extension.ts (rewrote the stale Set-049 comment to record the retirement); removed the package.json command contribution; bumped the Q7 watcher-allowlist line 154->153 for the one-line import-removal shift (per the test's own same-commit maintenance contract); recompiled the dist bundle. Docs reconciled as historical pointing at the Set 053 lifecycle advisory: CLAUDE.md (v0.25.0 bullet retirement note), ai-led-session-workflow.md (Schema-drift guard section + T3 declaration bullet), session-state-schema.md (Writer-Contract bullet), cross-repo-migration-guard-notice.md (superseded banner + neutralized install step + snippet + adoption table). Created docs/cross-repo-hook-retirement-notice.md (consumer/operator remediation note; does not edit machine settings).

Verification MANUAL (spec quality bar = no extension/Python regressions; cross-provider verification scoped to S4). Python: pytest 1028 passed / 1 skipped (was 1029; -1 = deleted test_invoker_schema_constant.py). TypeScript: tsc --noEmit clean; test:unit 554 passing, 2 failing (the known pre-existing Set-026 scaffolding failures: configEditor panel-lifecycle + notificationsSection rendering -- unrelated to the hook; both watcher tests now pass). package.json re-validated as well-formed JSON. The close_session gate run itself emitted the Set 053 drift advisory (46 sets below v4, advisory-only) -- live-mechanism confirmation. Code committed d533b28 + pushed. S3 invoked no router -- $0 routed; cumulative $0.0272 of $10 NTE.

Docs + dual version bumps. ai_router/CHANGELOG.md [0.14.0] (joiner/dabbler_launch island removal, D3 salvage to writer_discipline.py, backfill entry-point retirement, stray-test relocation + 3 latent fixes, wheel/entry-point guards, MIGRATIONS.md, dependency audit) + bump pyproject.toml + __init__.__version__ 0.13.0->0.14.0. Extension CHANGELOG.md [0.26.0] (Claude SessionStart hook retirement) + package.json/package-lock.json 0.25.0->0.26.0. Version reconciliation: ai_router 0.13.0 was Set 053's (never tagged to PyPI; last published v0.12.0) so the single 0.12.0->0.14.0 release carries both sets; extension 0.25.0 is Set 050's (vsix-v0.25.0 tag exists) so the hook retirement takes 0.26.0. CLAUDE.md version walk restructured (new Current v0.26.0; 7-label Pre-...-Previous cascade). V8 live-docs reconciliation finished: corrected stale present-tense ai_router/joiner/ refs in CLAUDE.md + ai-led-session-workflow.md to point D3 at writer_discipline.py (narration-templates.md + cross-repo-harvest-notice.md already had Set 051 removed banners from S2). Created set-level change-log.md.

Cross-provider whole-set verification. gemini-pro (google/gemini-2.5-pro) via providers.call_model with provider-scoped config, thinking_budget=6000, max_tokens=16000; given the actual code (old joiner/conflicts.py vs new writer_discipline.py + the S2 packaging diff) with each deviation framed neutrally. VERDICT: VERIFIED -- 0 critical, 0 important. Confirmed: D3 salvage 'almost perfectly behavior-preserving ... identical core logic'; V3 retire-not-repoint backfill entry point 'correct and justified'; V4 relocate-and-fix the stray tests 'correct and justified ... legitimate exception for code demonstrably not live because it was broken'; S3 deletion of claudeSessionStartInvoker.test.ts + the watcher-allowlist line bump both 'working as designed'. 1 nice-to-have (salvaged report note string +-2s ASCII vs original unicode) KEPT deliberately -- reverting would reintroduce the documented Windows cp1252 console-crash gotcha (Set 050 S2); detection behavior unchanged. Record at s4-verification.md. Suite: Python 1028 pass/1 skip/0 regressions; TS tsc clean + test:unit 554 pass/2 known-pre-existing-Set-026 fails; vsce package clean at 0.26.0 (21 files, 930 KB).
